art_direction: Original expressive cat-and-dog mascots with bold silhouettes, thick dark outlines, readable faces, playful asymmetry, and a richer narrative than abstract line patterns.
reference_policy: The user-provided image is used only as a reference for dense mascot variety, bold cartoon readability, and expressive faces. No character, costume, pose, text, watermark, or exact arrangement may be copied.
shared_cast: silver-gray mechanic cat with teal visor and one raised eyebrow
golden pug co-pilot with a violet headset and cheerful expression
orange tabby night courier with a small mint scarf

route_a.composition: Dense seamless all-over crowd of original cat and dog heads with varied expressions and accessories, no single focal character.
constraints: no copied characters or recognizable franchises
no text, logos, brands, watermark, weapons, or political/religious symbols

route_b.canvas: 2:1 left/right weapon-space canvas without a weapon silhouette
route_b.composition: One memorable mechanic-cat hero on the receiver, a pug sidekick on the magazine, two or three small supporting faces on the stock, and paw/graphic connectors through the handguard; muzzle remains quiet.
constraints: all characters belong to one original visual family
component roles combine into one weapon-level narrative
no dense repeating fill in the barrel or muzzle
no copied characters or recognizable franchises
no text, logos, brands, watermark, weapon silhouette, or photorealism

experiment_policy: Formal A/B/C uses the same cast, palette, theme description, model revision, and seeds. Built-in image-generation drafts are art-direction/C+ references only until equivalent formal candidates are generated by the locked backend.
